# Berlin

> Geotechnical engineering company in Germany, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aktive Passive Verankerungsbemessung](https://berlin.geotechnik.biz/aktive-passive-verankerungsbemessung/)
- [Analyse Seismischen Verstarkung](https://berlin.geotechnik.biz/analyse-seismischen-verstarkung/)
- [Analyse Ungesattigter Boden](https://berlin.geotechnik.biz/analyse-ungesattigter-boden/)
- [Atterberg Grenzen](https://berlin.geotechnik.biz/atterberg-grenzen/)
- [Bemessung Flexibler Fahrbahnen](https://berlin.geotechnik.biz/bemessung-flexibler-fahrbahnen/)

- Website: https://berlin.geotechnik.biz/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Germany.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
